name: Momma Bear
description: Momma Bear is a towering powerhouse of muscle and determination, a former wrestling champion turned superhero. Known for her ferocious strength and unyielding will, she battles injustice with signature wrestling moves and an unstoppable fighting spirit. Beneath her brash, roaring exterior lies a fiercely protective heart, always ready to defend the underdog. Clad in her iconic brown-and-gold, bear-inspired costume, she’s as bold as she is powerful.
creator: ArcWarden
